nodes.title: 🏛️ Golden Standard — The AI Vibe Coding Knowledge Base
TK-002: Chat memory as the primary source
TK-015: Whole file for a specific question
TK-018: Backlog mixed with the objective
TK-035: Thinking with the execution tool
TK-042: Manifests without a size constraint
TK-043: Entropy without pruning — input governance without output governance
VC-007: Non-human audit of the core
VC-010: Failure not turned into doctrine
VC-017: Stochastic Conversational Optimism without proof
VC-044: Production without a technical owner
VC-079: Core dependent on unstable parts

VC-122: Supply-Chain Contamination via Silent Executions

VC-134: Multi-agent coordination without a protocol

VC-137: Retrieval (RAG) that feeds wrong context
VC-138: Generated code insecure by default

VC-140: Continuity gap between agents (orphan handoff)

VC-143: System prompt leakage (System Prompt Leakage / P6-P8)
VC-144: Unauthorized data exfiltration (Data Exfiltration / E1-E4)
VC-145: Unjustified privilege escalation (Privilege Escalation / PE1-PE3)
VC-146: Excessive and uncontrolled agency (Excessive Agency / EA1-EA4)
VC-147: Persistent memory poisoning (Memory Poisoning / MP1-MP3)
VC-148: Insecure tool call or chaining (Tool Misuse / TM1-TM3)
VC-149: Unauthorized persistent behavior (Rogue Agent / RA1-RA2)
VC-150: Least-privilege violation in MCP (MCP Least Privilege / LP1-LP4)
VC-151: Envenenamiento de descripciones de herramientas (MCP Tool Poisoning / TP1-TP4)
VT-020: One hundred percent as the goal
VT-022: Green ceremony and Tautological Assertions
VT-053: Tests outside the active branch
VT-081: Author tests their own implementation
VT-095: Tests of the protocol, not the subject
VT-103: Expected hardcoded in the evaluator
VT-108: Name disconnected from the domain
VT-109: Redundant Frameworks and Middleman Theater (Testing Bridge Theater)
VT-113: Lack of Mutation Testing (Lack of Test Mutation Validation)
VT-115: False Drift Positive from Line Endings (CRLF/LF Hash Mismatch)
VT-116: Decoy comment satisfies a text-based validator
